description: POLL @ 2026-05-01T23:05:49Z (~11.97h after prior 2026-05-01T11:07:50Z poll — at-cadence). SECOND POST-EOM-CLOSURE POLL — 8 April-EOM PRED windows now d=0.96 past 2026-04-30T23:59Z close; PRED-105 d=13.96 past 2026-04-18 close. NET QUIET on dome public surface — ALL 6 covered page hashes BYTE-IDENTICAL to prior poll baseline AND to the original 2026-05-01T11:07Z baseline: home cb47aab7d62a8380d7f15c35afc0d4db (64,441), wins 16d65a42722d2d5869842d14c8f699f0 (91,686), predictions 885cd58727130018764b14355b0aa785 (152,936), coordinates 5127700325dc0b2bf69a0eea7a94df06 (14,061), model 28cef1a65d65bf6a0a3b0f77458d203d (58,429), evolution 93f99dd70d6d52fbb5616cbc5fec5aa5 (9,638); ai-context still 404 baseline. 24th consecutive byte-identical predictions.html poll / ~11.36 days. 13 commits since prior poll, ALL auto-only: 11x 'Auto-update ECM status' (f47c9e7 11:47Z, e18a704 12:46Z, f2c2050 14:10Z, 7b2a904 15:17Z, 49881ec 16:16Z, b32bee3 17:31Z, 6920db6 18:43Z, 675eb28 19:56Z, b3138ad 21:01Z, 07a1c9d 22:01Z, 267a6de 23:03Z), 2x 'auto: ECM data pull' (785b75e 12:52Z, 1c02c90 18:55Z). 0 manual commits. 0x 'auto: daily AI review' (HOLD #11 NOT YET FIRED — due ~07:35Z 2026-05-02, ~8.5h from now). 0 source-file touches: monitor.py 9de912a8, scripts/pull_data.py aa0573fe, scripts/build_daily_review.py ceddb04f, inject_ai_layer.py 58996a0c, verify_predictions.py db947cab, generate_manifest.js 786842ed (all SHAs identical to prior 4 polls). ai_manifest.json byte-identical 405d5c9371aa8ad32f040528e1731eb1/14880, version V51.1, last_updated=2026-04-17 unchanged; api/index.json last_updated=2026-04-17 unchanged. Live status_history.json now 512 entries (was 501 at prior poll; +11 entries from 11 Auto-update commits); latest entry 2026-05-01T23:03:46Z, eclipse_days=102 (still 102 — same UTC day as prior poll; will decrement to 101 at midnight ~55 min from now), wins_confirmed=67 (auto-pipeline internal counter, long-standing 67-vs-69 mismatch unchanged). MANUAL-COMMIT DROUGHT now 14.46d / 347.05h — FIRST 14d+ reading on the public record; 14d threshold was breached at 2026-05-01T12:02:38Z (~11.05h before this poll), exactly as the prior poll predicted. 26 consecutive polls of auto-only commits (was 25); last manual a57e731 still 2026-04-17T12:02:38Z. STEP 10b SILENT-IGNORE WATCH (9 PREDs in window, 1 at SEVERITY HIGH, 8 at SEVERITY LOW): PRED-105 (46° copper coil cucumber growth) now d=13.96 past 2026-04-18 close (was d=13.46) — 24th consecutive byte-identical pred-105 entry; literal 'Test window: April 18, 2026 (14-day window)' + 'PENDING' status unchanged; SEVERITY HIGH continues per Step 10b day-8+ rule (analyst already holds silent_ignore verdict); tacit_withdrawal threshold d=14 hits at 2026-05-02T12:02Z (~13h from now) — at next poll PRED-105 will hit d~14.5 and the analyst should consider whether to advance the verdict from silent_ignore to tacit_withdrawal. PRED-077 (M2 tidal Honolulu), PRED-081 (JWST z<0.1 SNe), PRED-085 (S-wave shadow zone), PRED-087 (Geoid low stationary), PRED-088 (Second geoid low), PRED-090 (NH TOA flux excess; our_verdict=recycled), PRED-106 (16 Hz Ca²⁺ ICR; our_verdict=pending), PRED-111 (Mascon 30°S 60°E) — all 8 still d=0.96 past close (Step 10b day-1-3 SEVERITY LOW continues); predictions.html byte-identical = ZERO post-closure adjudication on any of the 8 across two consecutive polls / ~24h post-close; no new WIN entries reference any of them; no commit messages in 13 post-prior-poll commits mention any PRED-NNN; no 'CONFIRMED'/'REFINED'/'FALSIFIED' badge transition on any pred-NNN in predictions.html (all 9 still labeled PENDING/PROSPECTIVE); badge enumeration unchanged. Parameters baseline-clean: model.html shows disc_radius 20,015 km (13 occurrences), firmament_height 8537 km / decay constant 8619 km (6+9 occurrences), refraction coefficient 0.20 (still 0.20, no shift back to 0.27). Home page title still verbatim 'Ovoid Cavity Cosmological Model V51.1 — 69 Confirmed Registry Items' — confirmed=69, accuracy=94.5%, V51.1 unchanged. Repo description still null. Canary OTS-provenance trap UNCHANGED — same 4 pre-existing .ots files (docs/data/status_history.json.ots fd9d0a8d, proofs/predictions_manifest.json.ots 411ec05e, proofs/weekly_predictions_2026-03-06.json.ots 5b9478e4, status_history.json.ots 3d3df225); proofs/weekly_predictions_2026-03-15.json STILL has no .ots companion; 0 canary-keyword hits across last 13 commits. Content-security sweep clean (0 prompt-injection phrases on any of 6 pages, 0 hidden-CSS anomalies). 2 chg-* files written: this one + chg-20260501-2305-002 (automated LOW — 13-commit auto rollup). Watch for next poll (~12h, morning 2026-05-02): (1) PRED-105 will be at d~14.5 — tacit_withdrawal threshold breached; analyst-priority HIGH continues with note that verdict-advancement decision is now ripe. (2) ALL 8 April-EOM PREDs at d~1.5 — still SEVERITY LOW unless any flips. (3) HOLD #11 daily-AI-review regen due ~07:35Z 2026-05-02 — second post-closure regen; if no adjudication then HOLD streak hits 11 consecutive. (4) Manual-commit drought enters d=14.96+ at next poll. (5) Any source-file touch → CRITICAL. (6) Any new OTS file referencing predictions-only → CANARY TRIGGERED. (7) eclipse_days will decrement to 101 at midnight ~55min from now. (8) Sq-subtraction methodology document (per analyst's 04-27T07:12 EXP-267 guidance) — classify likely-responsive per author-contact prior; if OTS-anchored before measurement, that IS the canary fix. OTHER SIDE OF ARGUMENT: 13 hours of total silence following first post-closure HOLD #10 regen + 26 consecutive auto-only polls + 14d+ manual drought is the (a)-favoring evidence trajectory continuing — pattern (a) 'sustained do-not-adjudicate as infrastructure' gains another data point, while pattern (b) 'imminent batched edit' loses ground (zero pre-staging visible across now 4 polls of post-closure window). However, the analyst at 17:23Z noted 'daily_review.json content DID change so cron is alive, registry-update step selectively skipped' — so the dome IS computing something every day; it just refuses to translate any of that into registry mutation. This is suggestive that the author has wired the registry-update step behind a manual-approval gate (or simply removed it), and that gate is what's stuck for 14+ days. If true, this contradicts the pattern (b) prediction that a single batched edit will land soon — under that hypothesis, what we'd actually see when the gate releases is a single large manual commit touching multiple pred-NNN entries simultaneously (and likely WIN registry too), NOT a batched auto-pipeline output. We should anticipate a manual-commit signature for any future adjudication, not an auto signature. Conservative substantive/MEDIUM with HIGH-severity sub-flag for PRED-105 only; EOM PREDs at LOW. PRESERVATION NOTE: this poll preserves analyst/decider/curmudgeon last_run + note + prev_agent_run + notes_this_run + patches_applied_this_run + issues_*_this_run + open_issues + closed_issues + curmudgeon_* + pat_note_resolved_by_operator + last_decider_* + last_analyst_* intact, only updating poll-owned fields (last_run/last_agent/run_type/mode/status, last_poll, changes_pending_analysis, consecutive_quiet_polls, last_poll_note, prev_agent_run).
